ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meals" (
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who consumed the meal */,
  "meal_time" TEXT /* Time of day the meal was consumed */,
  "carb_content" REAL /* Carbohydrate content of the meal */,
  "meal_type" TEXT /* Type of meal (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  "food_items" TEXT /* List of food items consumed during the meal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_glucose" (
  "bg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood glucose reading */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who had the reading */,
  "bg_value" REAL /* Value of the blood glucose reading */,
  "bg_time" TEXT /* Time of day the reading was taken */,
  "bg_type" TEXT /* Type of blood glucose reading (e.g., fasting, postprandial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_glucose_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insulin" (
  "insulin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insulin administration */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the insulin */,
  "insulin_type" TEXT /* Type of insulin administered (e.g., ESCADA-TC, STS-TC, Tuned Calc.) */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dosage of insulin administered */,
  "administration_time" TEXT /* Time of day the insulin was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insulin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insulin_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insulin_regimens" (
  "regimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insulin regimen */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who follows the regimen */,
  "regimen_name" TEXT /* Name of the insulin regimen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the insulin regimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insulin_regimens_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who follows the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "med_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who takes the medication */,
  "med_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("med_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who has the appointment */,
  "appt_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appt_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who scheduled the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vitals" (
  "vital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who has the vital sign */,
  "vital_sign" TEXT /* Type of vital sign (e.g., blood pressure, heart rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the vital sign */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the vital sign (e.g., mmHg, beats per minute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vitals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who had the lab test */,
  "lab_test" TEXT /* Type of lab test (e.g., hemoglobin A1c, lipid panel) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the lab test */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the lab test (e.g., mg/dL, mmol/L) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., patient, provider, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the provider (e.g., Dr., NP) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider (e.g., endocrinology, primary care) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_providers" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary care, specialist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "provider_id")
)
